title: [HW] Limited support for flattening struct types
body:
This is a first step towards #3144, adding support for flattening **non-nested** struct types in `hw.module`, `hw.instance`, `hw.struct_create`, `hw.struct_extract`, and `hw.output` operations.

Handling other operations should be mechanical, but I wanted to ask first if people think that this is the right way to approach this transformation.
